summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst James Faucette   reinstates Fidelity National Info (NYSE:FIS) with a Equal-Weight and announces $47 price target.

headline: Frankfurt International Bank Selects FIS to Bypass Legacy Infrastructure and Power Cloud-Native Treasury from Day One
summary: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., July 07, 2026--Global financial technology leader FIS® has been selected by Frankfurt International Bank AG (FIB), a newly licensed German bank, to power its treasury and risk operations. The bank has selected FIS Treasury & Risk Manager – Quantum Cloud Edition, which will deliver fully integrated front-to-back treasury coverage from day one, enabling the bank to build on modern infrastructure from inception, without inheriting or modernizing aging on-premise systems.
